title: Defer first-class file tracking to v2
description: Phase 2 ships with the git-log v1; first-class file tracking driven by hooks waits for a future phase.
rationale: First-class tracking would require a schema change in TicketLedgerEntry and a hook plumbing redesign — both out of scope for the handoff phase.
alternatives: Track files-touched in TicketLedgerEntry directly (rejected: schema churn).
Parse VCS blame on demand (rejected: too slow on large repos).
